name: Performance - FSR Processing Latency Under Load
description: Measures the response time of the /process_fsr endpoint when processing multiple concurrent requests to ensure it meets performance requirements.
input: Simultaneous POST requests to /process_fsr with valid FSRProcessRequest payloads.
output: All responses are returned within the acceptable latency threshold (e.g., < 2 seconds per request).
success_criteria: All responses are received within the defined latency threshold
No timeouts or server errors occur
